questions.question: Identify the primary organization behind the development of Android. What are the key components of this alliance?
questions.hint: The Open Handset Alliance (OHA) is a consortium of companies that develop, manufacture, and sell Android-based products.

questions.question: Explain the concept of an Android Activity. What are its key features and purposes in the Android architecture?
questions.hint: An Android Activity is a fundamental component of the Android architecture, representing the UI and business logic of an application.

questions.question: Describe the relationship between the Linux kernel and the Android operating system. What are the key features of the Linux kernel in the context of Android?
questions.hint: The Linux kernel serves as the foundation for the Android operating system, providing a stable and secure base for the Android architecture stack.
